text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The issue tracking software is connected to the software development platform for streamlined workflows.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração Issue Tracking Software com Plataforma de Desenvolvimento de Software", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o issue tracking software com a plataforma de desenvolvimento de software para melhorar a eficiência de fluxos de trabalho.

### Descrição Técnica
O issue tracking software deve ser configurado para se comunicar com a plataforma de desenvolvimento de software, permitindo que os desenvolvedores criem, atualizem e gerenciem issues de forma escalável e eficiente.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar API do issue tracking software à API da plataforma de desenvolvimento de software.
- [ ] Configurar autorização e autenticação para a comunicação entre os sistemas.
- [ ] Implementar mecanismos de fallback e erro para garantir a estabilidade do fluxo de trabalho.
- [ ] Testar a integração em diferentes cenários e ambientes.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The virtual assistant software utilizes natural language processing for improved user interaction.

### Response:
[{"title": "Natural Language Processing (NLP) Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate NLP library to enable improved user interaction.

### Technical Description
The virtual assistant software will utilize a pre-trained NLP model to analyze user input and generate responses. This will enhance the overall user experience by providing more accurate and relevant information.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a suitable NLP library
- [ ] Integrate the selected NLP library into the virtual assistant software
- [ ] Test and refine the NLP integration to ensure optimal performance", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
An automatic backup system is integrated into the database management software for data protection.

### Response:
[{"title": "Automatic Backup System for Database Management Software", "body": "### Objective
Integrate an automatic backup system into the database management software to ensure data protection.

### Technical Description
The automatic backup system will be integrated into the database management software to provide a reliable and efficient way to back up data. The system will be designed to run periodically, such as daily or weekly, to ensure that data is backed up regularly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the automatic backup system architecture
- [ ] Implement the automatic backup system integration with the database management software
- [ ] Configure the automatic backup system to run periodically
- [ ] Test the automatic backup system to ensure it is functioning correctly
- [ ] Implement logging and monitoring for the automatic backup system
- [ ] Document the automatic backup system implementation and usage", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The data integration platform connects with the ETL tool to simplify data consolidation.

### Response:
[{"title": "Data Integration Platform Setup", "body": "### Objective
Set up a data integration platform to connect with the ETL tool.

### Technical Description
The platform should be able to handle data from multiple sources and perform data transformation and quality checks. It should also provide a user-friendly interface for data analysts to manage and monitor the data integration process.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the data integration platform architecture.
- [ ] Integrate the platform with the ETL tool.
- [ ] Develop data transformation and quality checks.
- [ ] Implement user interface for data analysts.
- [ ] Conduct testing and debugging.
- [ ] Deploy the platform to a production environment.
", "labels": ["backend", "data-integration"]}, {"title": "ETL Tool Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the ETL tool with the data integration platform.

### Technical Description
The integration should enable the ETL tool to send data to the platform and receive data transformation and quality checks results.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop API integration between the platform and the ETL tool.
- [ ] Implement data transformation and quality checks using the ETL tool.
- [ ] Test and debug the integration.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to a production environment.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
Incorporating a recommendation engine into the content curation platform improves personalization.

### Response:
[{"title": "Recommendation Engine Integration", "body": "### Objective
Incorporate a recommendation engine into the content curation platform to improve personalization.

### Description
The recommendation engine will be integrated with the existing content curation platform to provide users with personalized content suggestions based on their interests and preferences.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the recommendation algorithm
- [ ] Integrate the recommendation engine with the content curation platform
- [ ] Develop a user interface for displaying recommended content
- [ ] Test and validate the recommendation engine
- [ ] Deploy the recommendation engine in a production-ready environment

Labels: [backend, api, architecture]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Content Curation Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the recommendation engine with the content curation platform.

### Description
The recommendation engine will be integrated with the existing content curation platform to provide users with personalized content suggestions.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configure API connections between the recommendation engine and the content curation platform
- [ ] Implement data processing and storage for content recommendations
- [ ] Integrate the recommendation engine with the content curation platform's UI
- [ ] Test and validate the integration

Labels: [backend, api, integration]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Algorithm Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop the recommendation algorithm for the content curation platform.

### Description
The algorithm will be designed to provide users with personalized content suggestions based on their interests and preferences.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and analyze existing recommendation algorithms
- [ ] Design and implement the recommendation algorithm
- [ ] Test and validate the algorithm
- [ ] Refine the algorithm based on performance metrics

Labels: [architecture, backend, algorithm]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The GPS tracking software is integrated with the fleet management system for real-time updates.

### Response:
[{"title": "GPS Tracking Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate GPS tracking software with fleet management system for real-time updates.

### Technical Description
The integration will require APIs to be set up for data exchange between the GPS tracking software and the fleet management system. The APIs will need to be secure and comply with industry standards.

### Tasks

- [ ] Implement security measures for APIs, such as encryption and authentication.
- [ ] Test APIs for functionality and security.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
The website monitoring platform is linked to the alerting system for prompt notifications.

### Response:
[{"title": "Alert System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the website monitoring platform with the alerting system for prompt notifications.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve connecting the monitoring platform's API with the alerting system's API to ensure seamless data exchange and notification delivery.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and document the APIs of both systems.
- [ ] Design and implement the integration using RESTful APIs and JSON data formats.
- [ ] Test the integration for correctness and reliability.
- [ ] Implement error handling and logging mechanisms.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The employee training software uses an adaptive learning system to personalize the experience.

### Response:
[{"title": "Adaptive Learning System Setup", "body": "### Objective
Implement an adaptive learning system to personalize the employee training experience.

### Description
The adaptive learning system will use machine learning algorithms to analyze user behavior and adjust the training content accordingly. This will require integration with the existing database and API.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the adaptive learning system architecture.
- [ ] Develop the machine learning algorithms for the adaptive learning system.
- [ ] Integrate the adaptive learning system with the existing database and API.
- [ ] Test the adaptive learning system with sample data.

Labels: [adaptive-learning, backend, api]", "labels": ["adaptive-learning", "backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
A multi-factor authentication system is implemented within the secure file storage platform.

### Response:
[{"title": "Multi-Factor Authentication Implementation", "body": "### Objective
Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) within the secure file storage platform to enhance user security.

### Technical Description
The MFA system will require integration with existing authentication mechanisms, including username/password authentication and two-factor authentication (2FA) via SMS or authenticator apps. The system will also need to accommodate various authentication factors, such as biometric data (e.g., facial recognition, fingerprint scanning) and physical tokens.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the MFA system architecture
- [ ] Integrate the MFA system with existing authentication mechanisms
- [ ] Develop and test 2FA methods (SMS, authenticator apps)
- [ ] Integrate biometric data and physical token authentication
- [ ] Conduct security testing and review
- [ ] Deploy the MFA system in production", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The time tracking software is connected to the invoicing platform for efficient billing.

### Response:
[{"title": "Incorporate Invoicing Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate time tracking software with invoicing platform to enable efficient billing.

### Technical Description
The invoicing platform will receive time tracking data and generate invoices accordingly. The integration should ensure seamless data exchange and accurate billing.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research invoicing platform API and data formats.
- [ ] Develop API integration with time tracking software.
- [ ] Test API integration with sample data.
- [ ] Deploy integrated solution to production environment.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Time Tracking Data Processing", "body": "### Objective
Process time tracking data for invoicing platform integration.

### Technical Description
The time tracking data should be processed and formatted according to the invoicing platform's requirements. This includes aggregating data, handling errors, and ensuring data integrity.

### Tasks
- [ ] Review time tracking data schema and invoicing platform requirements.
- [ ] Develop data processing pipeline to transform time tracking data.
- [ ] Test data processing pipeline with sample data.
- [ ] Deploy data processing pipeline to production environment.

", "labels": ["backend", "data-processing"]}]

### Input:
An advanced search feature is incorporated into the knowledge management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Advanced Search Feature", "body": "### Objective
Implement an advanced search feature in the knowledge management system to improve search functionality.

### Technical Description
The advanced search feature should allow users to search for specific terms, phrases, and combinations of keywords. It should also provide filters to refine search results by date, category, and author.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and design the advanced search feature, considering user experience and search functionality.
- [ ] Develop the advanced search feature, integrating it with the existing knowledge management system.
- [ ] Test the advanced search feature to ensure it meets the requirements and is user-friendly.
- [ ] Deploy the advanced search feature to the production environment.

Labels: [backend, api, search]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
To streamline communication the instant messaging app integrates with the project management tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate Instant Messaging App with Project Management Tool", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the instant messaging app with the project management tool to streamline communication.

### Technical Description
The integration will allow users to send and receive messages, share files and collaborate on tasks directly from the project management tool.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the integration architecture
- [ ] Implement API calls between the instant messaging app and the project management tool
- [ ] Test the integration for errors and performance", "labels": ["integration", "api", "backend"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The customer satisfaction survey tool connects to the helpdesk software for better insights.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Helpdesk", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a ferramenta de satisfação do cliente com o software de helpdesk para obter insights mais precisos.

### Descrição Técnica
Realizar uma integração RESTful com o API do helpdesk para coletar dados de incidentes e solicitações. O sistema deve ser capaz de processar dados em tempo real e atualizar a base de dados da ferramenta de satisfação do cliente.

### Tasks
- [ ] Realizar a integração RESTful com o API do helpdesk.
- [ ] Implementar a lógica de negócios para processar dados em tempo real.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes cenários de uso.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Autenticação e Autorização", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar autenticação e autorização para a integração com o helpdesk.

### Descrição Técnica
Desenvolver um sistema de autenticação e autorização para garantir que apenas usuários autorizados tenham acesso à integração. O sistema deve ser capaz de gerar tokens de autenticação e validar as solicitações de integração.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar autenticação com token de acesso.
- [ ] Implementar autorização com permissões de acesso.
- [ ] Testar a autenticação e autorização com diferentes cenários de uso.", "labels": ["backend", "security"]}, {"title": "Infraestrutura", "body": "### Objetivo
Instalar e configurar a infraestrutura necessária para a integração com o helpdesk.

### Descrição Técnica
Instalar e configurar um servidor para hospedar a aplicação. O servidor deve ter recursos suficientes para processar dados em tempo real e manter a integração estável.

### Tasks
- [ ] Instalar e configurar um servidor para hospedar a aplicação.
- [ ] Configurar as configurações de rede e firewall.
- [ ] Testar a infraestrutura para garantir que esteja pronta para a integração.", "labels": ["infrastructure"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
Anomaly detection is a key feature of the network intrusion detection system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Anomaly Detection Feature Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop an anomaly detection feature for the network intrusion detection system.

### Technical Description
The feature should be able to identify and flag unusual patterns in network traffic. This may involve analyzing traffic data, identifying statistical anomalies, and flagging suspicious activity.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the anomaly detection algorithm
- [ ] Integrate the algorithm with the network intrusion detection system
- [ ] Test and validate the feature
- [ ] Document the feature and its functionality", "labels": ["backend", "api", "machine-learning"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
Integrating the file sharing platform with a permission management system enhances security.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate File Sharing with Permission Management", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the file sharing platform with a permission management system to enhance security.

### Technical Description
The integration will require:

### Tasks
- [ ] Research existing permission management systems and assess their compatibility with the file sharing platform.
- [ ] Design and implement API endpoints for managing permissions.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure secure access to shared files.
- [ ] Test the integration thoroughly to ensure seamless functionality and robust security.

Labels: [permissions, security, file-sharing, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Research Permission Management Systems", "body": "### Objective
Research existing permission management systems to assess their compatibility with the file sharing platform.

### Technical Description
This task involves:

### Tasks
- [ ] Review documentation and APIs of popular permission management systems.
- [ ] Evaluate the systems' features, pros, and cons.
- [ ] Identify potential integration points and compatibility issues.

Labels: [permissions, security, research]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Design API Endpoints for Permission Management", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement API endpoints for managing permissions in the file sharing platform.

### Technical Description
This task involves:

### Tasks
- [ ] Define API endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting permissions.
- [ ] Design API request and response formats.
- [ ] Implement API endpoint implementation.

Labels: [api, permissions, security]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Implement Authentication and Authorization", "body": "### Objective
Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure secure access to shared files.

### Technical Description
This task involves:

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement authentication mechanisms (e.g., OAuth, JWT).
- [ ] Implement authorization mechanisms (e.g., role-based access control).
- [ ] Integrate authentication and authorization with the file sharing platform.

Labels: [security, authentication, authorization]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Test Integration", "body": "### Objective
Test the integration of the file sharing platform with the permission management system.

### Technical Description
This task involves:

### Tasks
- [ ] Test API endpoints and authentication/authorization mechanisms.
- [ ] Verify seamless functionality and robust security.
- [ ] Identify and resolve any integration issues.

Labels: [testing, security, integration]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Zoom API", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a aplicação de vídeo conferência com a API do Zoom para agendar e gerenciar reuniões.

### Descrição Técnica
A aplicação deve ser capaz de se conectar à API do Zoom e realizar as seguintes operações:
* Scheduling de reuniões
* Gerenciamento de reuniões (cancelamento, alteração de horário, etc.)

### Tasks
- [ ] Realizar a integração com a API do Zoom
- [ ] Implementar a lógica para agendar e gerenciar reuniões
- [ ] Testar a integração com a API do Zoom

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
The online advertising system integrates with the Google Ads API for managing and optimizing ad campaigns.

### Response:
[{"title": "Google Ads API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the online advertising system with the Google Ads API for managing and optimizing ad campaigns.

### Technical Description
The integration will require authentication with the Google Ads API using OAuth 2.0. We will need to implement API calls to retrieve and update ad campaign data.

### Tasks

- [ ] Implement API calls to retrieve ad campaign data.
- [ ] Implement API calls to update ad campaign data.
- [ ] Test the integration with a test environment.

Labels: backend, api", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
The virtual reality platform utilizes the Oculus API for creating and managing VR experiences.

### Response:
[{"title": "Oculus API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate Oculus API for virtual reality experiences.

### Technical Description
The platform will utilize the Oculus API for creating and managing VR experiences. This integration will enable features such as virtual reality environment setup, user management, and experience sharing.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research Oculus API documentation and requirements.
- [ ] Implement Oculus API integration in the platform.
- [ ] Test Oculus API integration for compatibility and functionality.
- [ ] Document Oculus API integration and its usage in the platform.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "VR Experience Management", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement the management system for VR experiences.

### Technical Description
The platform will require a system to manage VR experiences, including features such as experience creation, editing, and deletion. This system will also need to handle user authentication and authorization for accessing and sharing VR experiences.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the data model for VR experiences.
- [ ] Implement the experience management system.
- [ ] Test experience management system for functionality and usability.
- [ ] Document experience management system and its usage in the platform.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "User Management", "body": "### Objective
Implement user management system for the virtual reality platform.

### Technical Description
The platform will require a system to manage user accounts, including features such as user registration, login, and profile management. This system will also need to handle user authentication and authorization for accessing and sharing VR experiences.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the data model for user accounts.
- [ ] Implement user management system.
- [ ] Test user management system for functionality and usability.
- [ ] Document user management system and its usage in the platform.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
The weather application connects with the Dark Sky API for hyperlocal weather forecasts and conditions.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrar API de Previsão de Tempo", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a API da Dark Sky para obter previsões de tempo hyperlocal.

### Descrição Técnica
A API da Dark Sky fornecerá previsões de tempo hyperlocal para a aplicação de tempo. O desenvolvedor precisará configurar a API para obter os dados necessários.

### Tasks
- [ ] Requisitar chaves de API da Dark Sky.
- [ ] Configurar a API da Dark Sky para obter previsões de tempo hyperlocal.
- [ ] Implementar a integração da API na aplicação de tempo.
- [ ] Testar a integração da API para garantir que os dados sejam retornados corretamente.

#labels backend, api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Desenvolver API de Tempo", "body": "### Objetivo
Desenvolver a API de tempo para a aplicação de tempo.

### Descrição Técnica
A API de tempo será responsável por fornecer previsões de tempo para a aplicação. O desenvolvedor precisará projetar e implementar a API de tempo.

### Tasks
- [ ] Projetar a estrutura da API de tempo.
- [ ] Implementar a lógica de negócios da API de tempo.
- [ ] Implementar a API de tempo utilizando a linguagem e framework escolhidos.
- [ ] Testar a API de tempo para garantir que esteja funcionando corretamente.

#labels backend, api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The time tracking software is integrated with the Toggl API for managing work hours and productivity.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Toggl API", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a aplicação de tracking de tempo com a API do Toggl para gerenciar horas de trabalho e produtividade.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração deve ser feita utilizando a API REST do Toggl e should allow for the creation, reading, updating, and deletion of time entries. The integration should also allow for the retrieval of user and project information from the Toggl API.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar API REST para comunicação com o Toggl
- [ ] Implementar lógica de negócios para gerenciar horas de trabalho e produtividade
- [ ] Testar integração com API do Toggl", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Geração de Relatórios", "body": "### Objetivo
Gerar relatórios detalhados sobre as horas de trabalho e produtividade dos usuários.

### Descrição Técnica
O relatório deve incluir informações como tempo gasto em projetos, tempo gasto em tarefas, tempo total gasto e produtividade diária. O relatório também deve ser capaz de ser filtrado por data e usuário.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar lógica de negócios para gerar relatórios
- [ ] Implementar apresentação de relatórios para os usuários
- [ ] Testar gerenciamento de relatórios", "labels": ["backend", "reporting"]}, {"title": "Integração com Banco de Dados", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a aplicação com um banco de dados para armazenar e recuperar informações sobre as horas de trabalho e produtividade dos usuários.

### Descrição Técnica
O banco de dados deve ser capaz de armazenar informações como usuários, projetos, tarefas e horas de trabalho. O banco de dados também deve ser capaz de recuperar essas informações para que possam ser usadas na aplicação.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar integração com o banco de dados
- [ ] Implementar lógica de negócios para armazenar e recuperar informações
- [ ] Testar integração com o banco de dados", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The stock trading application connects with the IEX Cloud API for accessing stock market data and financial information.

### Response:
[{"title": "Connect to IEX Cloud API", "body": "### Objetivo
